query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `group_schedules` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `group_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `day_of_week` INT NOT NULL COMMENT '0=Sunday, 1=Monday, ..., 6=Saturday',
  `start_time` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT 'HH:MM format',
  `end_time` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT 'HH:MM format',
  `required_hours` DECIMAL(4, 2) NOT NULL,
  `effective_date` DATE NULL COMMENT 'تاريخ بدء تطبيق الوردية (NULL = تطبيق فوري)',
  `is_active` BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  `created_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_group_schedules_group_id` (`group_id`),
  INDEX `idx_group_schedules_day_of_week` (`day_of_week`),
  INDEX `idx_group_schedules_effective_date` (`effective_date`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
